MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-27-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
Defendants Uber Technologies, Inc., Rasier, LLC and Rasier-CA, LLC's motion to strike punitive damages allegations in the complaint is granted without leave to amend. No opposition filed. Moving party to prepare form of order. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Carol Karen CSR #8189 =302/hk
